summary: Exceptional audience recording with full, echo‑rich sound that captures a pristine High Time performance.
review: Both reviewers hail this audience master as the best of its show, praising its surprisingly full mix and the gentle arena echo that softens quiet passages. The highlight for them is a flawless rendition of “High Time,” described as tear‑jerkingly perfect, making the set feel both intimate and towering in quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are 5‑star and focus on superb audio fidelity and a standout High Time performance, indicating an excellent show captured with top‑tier audience recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Full, arena‑echo sound with crystal grain; described as the best audience master of this show and praised for its quiet‑part softness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note a smooth, immersive flow highlighted by soft edges on quieter sections and an overall towering adventure feel.
